headline: Iraq threatens to leave OPEC over quota dispute
detail: Escalating OPEC fractures could push oil prices lower if supply discipline breaks down. Lower energy costs are generally a mild tailwind for tech and chip manufacturing margins, but the effect on your specific names is indirect and secondary.

headline: Chevron warns gas prices won't fall quickly
detail: Sticky energy prices keep input cost pressure alive across industrial and logistics supply chains, which can weigh on semiconductor equipment capex timelines. Not an immediate threat to your book, but worth noting if chip demand forecasts start softening.
